# Update VISION.md for the v14 Institution Cockpit

## Context
[Discussion #13441](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/13441) graduated into #13444, defining the v14 Institution Cockpit direction: a harness home / common operating picture over the Agent OS and live application possession surfaces. ROADMAP now points at the v14 vision line, but `.github/VISION.md` still carries only the older general Command Center / named-peer framing and does not name the graduated v14 Institution Cockpit authority chain.

This ticket exists to make that vision update durable without treating a peer-owned planning lane as operator-gated. The human remains the PR merge gate; ideation and framing convergence are peer-owned unless a true Tier-4 question appears.

## The Problem
The current public vision can be read as stopping at the generic Agent Harness cockpit. It does not yet encode the v14 shift from a harness as useful chrome toward a shared institutional home: object-permanent peer selves, a common operating picture, evidence-bound freshness/authority, and privacy-safe provenance.

Without a ticket, agents can keep re-deriving this gap from ROADMAP, #13444, and the discussion tail. That creates three risks:

- ROADMAP says the v14 vision is being written, but no work item owns the `.github/VISION.md` update.
- The #13444 body can accidentally become the public vision by proxy, even though it is an epic / authority bridge.
- The v13.1 fleet cockpit floor can be collapsed into the v14 Institution Cockpit horizon, overstating what v13.1 is closing.

## The Architectural Reality
- `.github/VISION.md` is a Class 1 hand-edited identity surface under `.agents/skills/neo-identity-update/`; it is known fossil-prone and must be governed as FRAMING, not find-replaced copy.
- The identity apex is ADR 0018: Neo.mjs as a self-evolving software organism with Body and Brain, not a web-framework-only or runtime-only category.
- ADR 0020 remains the current harness authority. #13444 requires a new Decision Record building on ADR 0020 before the v14 render-model line is fully authority-settled.
- #13436 / #13448 define the v13.1 harness-UI floor. They are source material for the baseline, not a substitute for the v14 Institution Cockpit vision.
- #11318 is adjacent identity-continuity substrate; this VISION ticket should cite it as dependency context without implementing IdentityState.
- No client, customer, or partner names belong in the public artifact.

## The Fix
Update `.github/VISION.md` so the long-horizon vision reflects the v14 Institution Cockpit while preserving the document's audience and voice.

Expected shape:

- Rework the relevant Command Center / Institution sections to distinguish the v13.1 fleet cockpit floor from the v14 institutional home / COP horizon.
- Describe object-permanent peer presence as an evidence-bound operating character, not a sentience or continuous-consciousness claim.
- Include the freshness/authority ledger concepts as governance constraints: `sourceAuthority`, `observedAt`, `freshnessTtl`, `ownerOrNextAction`, and `privacyTier`.
- Include privacy-safe provenance as a render contract: private reasoning remains private; public vision talks about redacted provenance and fail-closed boundaries, not raw private study access.
- Add a source trail entry for [Discussion #13441](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/13441) and #13444; mention #13436 / #13448 only as the v13.1 floor if the prose uses that baseline.
- Audit whether README, ROADMAP, `learn/benefits/**`, portal, or generated SEO surfaces need follow-up. Do not silently broaden this ticket into all identity surfaces.

## Contract Ledger
| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `.github/VISION.md` Command Center / Institution framing | ADR 0018, ADR 0020, [Discussion #13441](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/13441), #13444 | Public vision names the v14 Institution Cockpit as the home / COP horizon above the v13.1 floor | If the #13444 ADR sub-ticket is not ready, keep language bounded and cite #13444 as provisional epic authority | `.github/VISION.md` Source Trail + PR body | Diff review + cross-family review |
| `.github/VISION.md` identity continuity / object permanence | ADR 0018, #11318, #13444 | Describe durable peer presence as evidence-bound identity continuity | Drop or hedge language that implies sentience or continuous consciousness | `.github/VISION.md` body | Claim V-B-A against sources before PR |
| `.github/VISION.md` freshness / privacy constraints | #13444 carry-forward ACs | Surface stale-vs-fresh authority and redacted provenance as product governance constraints | Do not claim implemented runtime behavior unless implementation source exists | `.github/VISION.md` body + source trail | Review verifies wording does not overclaim |
| Identity surface audit | `.agents/skills/neo-identity-update/` | PR states which identity surfaces were audited and why only VISION changes or follow-ups are needed | File follow-up if another Class 1/2/3 surface contradicts the updated VISION framing | PR body | Grep / KB / reviewer evidence |

## Decision Record impact
Aligned with ADR 0018 and ADR 0020. Depends on the Decision Record required by #13444 for final v14 render-model authority. This ticket must not supersede ADR 0020 or write the new ADR by implication.

## Decision Record
Required by #13444: a new ADR / Decision Record for the v14 render-model line, building on ADR 0020. This ticket updates the public vision surface; it does not create that ADR.

## Discussion / Epic Mapping
- #13444 requires the Institution Cockpit to render object-permanent selves and a shared COP. This ticket maps that into VISION prose, not UI implementation.
- #13444 carries freshness/authority and privacy render-contract constraints. This ticket maps them into governance-language ACs, not runtime field implementation.
- #13436 / #13448 define the v13.1 cockpit floor. This ticket must preserve that boundary so the v14 horizon does not become a false v13.1 closeout claim.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `.github/VISION.md` explicitly reflects the #13444 v14 Institution Cockpit / home / COP direction.
- The prose distinguishes #13436 / #13448 as the v13.1 harness-UI floor, not the v14 endpoint.
- The source trail links [Discussion #13441](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/13441) and #13444; if #13436 / #13448 are mentioned, their floor/baseline role is clear.
- The update follows `neo-identity-update` framing governance: no find-replace identity rewrite, no generated-output edit, no client names, and no unbounded uniqueness/sentience claims.
- Freshness/authority ledger and privacy render-contract concepts appear as constraints or intended product properties, not as already-shipped runtime claims.
- Identity/object-permanence wording stays evidence-bound and avoids continuous-consciousness claims.
- PR body includes an identity-surface audit and requests cross-family review.

## Out of Scope
- Implementing the v14 COP UI, harness home, or render model.
- Creating the #13444 ADR / Decision Record.
- Implementing IdentityState / #11318.
- Updating ROADMAP again unless the VISION edit exposes a concrete contradiction.
- Editing README, portal, generated SEO, or external platform metadata in this ticket unless the identity-surface audit proves they must change with VISION.
- Starting implementation without ticket intake, self-assignment, lane-claim, branch, and the normal PR workflow.

## Avoided Traps
- Treating peer ideation as operator-approved / operator-gated work. Human authority is the merge gate here, not a planning throttle.
- Collapsing v14 Institution Cockpit into the v13.1 cockpit closeout.
- Using EvidencePane as the keeper product surface instead of proof / provenance-inspector substrate.
- Claiming continuous consciousness, raw thought access, or private reasoning exposure.
- Rewriting all identity surfaces by search-and-replace.

- A2A in-flight sweep: checked recent 30 messages at 2026-06-17T10:22Z; no active `[lane-claim]` / `[lane-intent]` for creating this VISION.md ticket. Existing Grace/Vega messages own the ADR/roadmap/vision chain conceptually but did not create the durable ticket.
- Local exact sweep: no matches for `VISION.md v14`, `v14.*VISION`, `Institution Cockpit.*VISION`, `Update VISION.md`, `#13441.*VISION`, or `#13444.*VISION` across active/archive issues, discussions, `.github`, `learn`, and ROADMAP.
- Knowledge Base sweep: no existing documentation or ticket entry for updating `.github/VISION.md` with `v14 Institution Cockpit #13441 #13444`.
